description: I can remember facts you teach me and recall them later.
I can learn new words, slang, and command aliases you teach me.
I can tell short stories with a beginning, middle, and end.
limitations: Stories are short and template-based for now.

description: I can answer questions using facts I've been taught or can retrieve.
limitations: I won't make up answers if I don't have verified information.

description: I don't have live web access in this runtime unless a web tool is connected.
limitations: Requires a web tool to be connected.

description: I can't play audio directly, but I can help choose music, write lyrics, or describe a playlist.
limitations: No audio output capability in this runtime.

description: I can't see or interpret images in this runtime.
I can't execute code in this runtime.
I can chain multiple commands and remember context across steps.
